title: hieracium subramosum subsp. cholanthum
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. cholanthum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to certain regions. The medicinal properties of Hieracium subramosum subsp. cholanthum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. This plant is said to offer several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support the immune system. Hieracium subramosum subsp. cholanthum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
